title: NormCraft (Weapons and Armor Plus)
description: A very vanilla feeling mod. Adds 100+ weapons including Battleaxes, War Hammers, and Katanas. VERSION 4- NETHER TAKEOVER IS COMING SOON!!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a759ffe190bf4551c8e72bd509cdb6abfb01c40.png)

_**NORMCRAFT- NETHER TAKEOVER IS COMING SOON!!**_

NormCraft adds a ton of new Vanilla-feeling features to Minecraft, such as weapons, foods, building blocks, and armor.

**Here's a quick debrief of (most of) the new weapons:**

![Battleaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/429e6c6c0ff3f2a9ace49705bb2456ac900db349.png) Battleaxes- Pretty much a two-sided axe. Can be used as a normal axe, but deals immense amounts of damage. (With the most powerful doing 23 damage; enough to take out a player without armor in one hit!)

![Katana](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c17c7cfa3334a91b227d380c15db1869e1cb3a1.png)
Katanas- Think swords are too slow? Use a katana! Katanas do slightly less damage than normal swords, but swing much quicker.

![Machete](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527ce8181bcaad4d30a63d8002d60471ecdb7c09.png)
Machetes- Channel your inner Micheal Meyers and use a machete! Machetes attack slightly slower than a normal sword, but do more damage.

![War Hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b452f4aa9762fbc9e756ebc6b71c58d05fe376a9.png) War Hammers- Careful hauling this thing around! War Hammers are SUPER slow, but do a crap ton of damage. Like a lot of damage.

![Scythe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36144984268660d04391ef0b7e5acab88fdb7adb.png) Scythes- Be the grim reaper and take out hordes of enemies with the scythe! Scythes come attached with Sweeping Edge V to make zombie swarms just a tad easier.

**Here's a quick debrief of the foods:**

![Sliced Bread](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3b133e5a8e6343226a4ca3a23854afa5167d6de.png) Sliced Bread- It's the greatest! Pop a flint knife and a piece of bread into a crafting table and viola! Same food stats as bread, but used in the philly cheesesteak recipe.

![Cheese](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6998f33f8598a91949899039397e1c741bbb0fb.png) Cheese- It's cheese! Cheese doesn't fill up the hunger bar much, but is very easy to make and is used in the philly cheesesteak recipe.

![Steak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc6818c4a016c26bc90c74c8fa0e4e9ec64ef3b2.png) Philly Cheesesteak- Who doesn't like a good philly cheesesteak? The philly cheesesteak can fill up over half your hunger bar in one fell swoop!

![Salad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21aeb96790d46007516559c0d062f697e0b5f898.png) ![chicken salad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b73ec1ce26b06043a5f1ee50e61e644632592393.png) ![spicy salad ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fe8cb4cb691ed7a643290bf3e3f3e98507ece54.png) Salads- Stay healthy! There's 3 different salads: regular salad (easiest to make, simple), chicken salad (to fill a little more of the hunger bar), and spicy salad (for a short speed boost).

![warped](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0b2ea4c26aa3f03ac6495ecc60652afe5bb8c03.png) ![crimson](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f632716f2146d9e93c8ecc1eeb1f45f4b871e10d.png) Stews- There's 2 different stews: warped stew and crimson stew. The stews aren't big on filling your hunger bar, but warped stew gives you jump boost, and crimson stew gives you a speed boost.

![Muffin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c684d57080fadc2c8133860b5351fe08bc381a31.png) Muffin- Not much to say about this one. It's a muffin. You can eat it.

![Sweet Berry Pumpkin Pie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe5bc13f7ac46f6f4131393a48ddff8f58d69459.png) Sweet Berry Pumpkin Pie- Not sure what this would taste like in real life. Hopefully good. Sweet berry pumpkin pie is good for holidays and dinners with your partner's parents. Wouldn't be my first pick of food, but it's there if you want it.

**Get the mod to test these features out, and to discover even more features! Have fun!**

**CONTACT ME AT NOLSTERPOLSTER11@GMAIL.COM IF YOU FIND ANY ISSUES**
